title: HR Coordinator
description:
Raytheon is a major aerospace and defense contractor supplying technology to government and commercial customers globally.

We're seeking a HR Coordinator to join our Defense team in San Jose. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Support employee recruitment, onboarding, and offboarding processes
Maintain personnel files and ensure compliance with HR regulations
Coordinate benefits administration and employee relations activities
Prepare HR reports and maintain HRIS database
Assist with employee engagement initiatives and training programs
Support payroll and tax compliance activities

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Human Resources, Business, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 1-3 years in HR operations, HR administration, or recruiting

benefits: Hybrid work arrangement in San Jose
